incident.message: Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.

This intent filter has the format of an Android App Link but is missing the `autoVerify` attribute; add `android:autoVerify="true"` to ensure your domain will be validated and enable App Link-related Lint warnings. If you do not want clicked URLs to bring the user to your app, remove the `android.intent.category.BROWSABLE` category, or set `android:autoVerify="false"` to make it clear this is not intended to be an Android App Link.
Use `enqueueUniquePeriodicWork()` instead of `enqueue()`

Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter

This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
Very long vector path (8465 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.

Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/surface_light` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.SpendSync`)

The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive roundIcon is missing a monochrome tag

The image `ic_launcher.png` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi/ic_launcher.png: 683x683 dp (1024x1024 px), mipmap-mdpi/ic_launcher.png: 1024x1024 dp (1024x1024 px), mipmap-xhdpi/ic_launcher.png: 512x512 dp (1024x1024 px), mipmap-xxhdpi/ic_launcher.png: 341x341 dp (1024x1024 px), mipmap-xxxhdpi/ic_launcher.png: 256x256 dp (1024x1024 px)

The image `ic_launcher_foreground_image.png` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi/ic_launcher_foreground_image.png: 683x683 dp (1024x1024 px), mipmap-mdpi/ic_launcher_foreground_image.png: 1024x1024 dp (1024x1024 px), mipmap-xhdpi/ic_launcher_foreground_image.png: 512x512 dp (1024x1024 px), mipmap-xxhdpi/ic_launcher_foreground_image.png: 341x341 dp (1024x1024 px), mipmap-xxxhdpi/ic_launcher_foreground_image.png: 256x256 dp (1024x1024 px)

The image `ic_launcher_round.png` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 683x683 dp (1024x1024 px), mipmap-mdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 1024x1024 dp (1024x1024 px), mipmap-xhdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 512x512 dp (1024x1024 px), mipmap-xxhdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 341x341 dp (1024x1024 px), mipmap-xxxhdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 256x256 dp (1024x1024 px)
